hook: Style can support attraction, but ease is what usually makes style believable.
body: People trust a polished look more when your body language suggests that you actually inhabit it comfortably.

hook: Trying too hard to look elevated can create stiffness that undercuts the whole photo.
body: Choose photos where you look at home in your own presentation, not just technically well-dressed.

hook: Choose photos where you look at home in your own presentation, not just technically well-dressed.
body: A simpler outfit worn with relaxed posture often reads stronger than a more expensive look worn like a costume.

body: Favor the photos where your presence feels settled, even if they are slightly less flashy.
